linux: export GOROOT="$(asdf where golang)/go"' | sudo tee /etc/profile.d/asdf.sh

ubuntu.before: (add-apt-repository -L | grep 'apt.kitware.com/ubuntu') || (wget -O - https://apt.kitware.com/keys/kitware-archive-latest.asc 2>/dev/null | gpg --dearmor - | sudo tee /etc/apt/trusted.gpg.d/kitware.gpg >/dev/null && sudo add-apt-repository --yes "deb https://apt.kitware.com/ubuntu/ $(lsb_release -cs) main" && sudo apt update)

windows.after: pnpm env use --global latest && pnpm install -g vite create-vite commitizen cz-conventional-changelog yarn

linux.after: pnpm env use --global latest && pnpm install -g vite create-vite commitizen cz-conventional-changelog yarn

windows.before: winget list --id gerardog.gsudo *>$null || winget install --id gerardog.gsudo

fedora.before:
[ -f /etc/yum.repos.d/vscode.repo ] || (sudo rpm --import https://packages.microsoft.com/keys/microsoft.asc && sudo sh -c 'echo -e "[code]
name=Visual Studio Code
baseurl=https://packages.microsoft.com/yumrepos/vscode
enabled=1
gpgcheck=1
gpgkey=https://packages.microsoft.com/keys/microsoft.asc" > /etc/yum.repos.d/vscode.repo' && dnf check-update)

ubuntu.before: [ -s /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list ] || (curl -fsSL https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg | sudo dd of=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg && sudo chmod go+r /usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list > /dev/null && sudo apt update)

((add-apt-repository -L | grep 'wireshark-dev/stable') || (sudo add-apt-repository --yes ppa:wireshark-dev/stable && sudo apt update)) && ((sudo debconf-get-selections | grep wireshark-common *> /dev/null) || (echo 'wireshark-common wireshark-common/install-setuid boolean true' | sudo debconf-set-selections))

[ -s /etc/apt/sources.list.d/hashicorp.list ] || (wget -O- https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com/gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/hashicorp-archive-keyring.gpg && echo "deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/hashicorp-archive-keyring.gpg] https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com $(lsb_release -cs) main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/hashicorp.list && apt update)

[ -s /etc/apt/sources.list.d/cloudflared.list ] || (curl -fsSL https://pkg.cloudflare.com/cloudflare-main.gpg | sudo tee /usr/share/keyrings/cloudflare-main.gpg >/dev/null && echo "deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/cloudflare-main.gpg] https://pkg.cloudflare.com/cloudflared $(lsb_release -cs) main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/cloudflared.list && apt update)

ubuntu.sh: mkdir /tmp/exercism && cd /tmp/exercism && curl -sSL https://github.com/exercism/cli/releases/download/v3.2.0/exercism-3.2.0-ubuntu-x86_64.tar.gz | tar -xzvf - && sudo chmod +x exercism && sudo chown root exercism && sudo mv exercism /usr/bin/exercism && cd ~

windows.after: rustup toolchain install stable-msvc ; rustup toolchain install stable-gnu ; rustup target add x86_64-pc-windows-msvc ; rustup target add x86_64-pc-windows-gnu

linux.after: rustup toolchain install stable-gnu && rustup target add x86_64-pc-windows-gnu && rustup target add x86_64-unknown-ubuntu-gnu

windows.after: python -m ensurepip ; python -m pip install -U requests beautifulsoup4 matplotlib pandas ipykernel

ubuntu.before: sudo apt install -y tk-dev liblzma-dev libffi-dev libncurses5-dev zlib1g zlib1g-dev libssl-dev libreadline-dev libbz2-dev libsqlite3-dev && asdf plugin-add python https://github.com/asdf-community/asdf-python.git
ubuntu.after: python -m ensurepip && python -m pip install -U requests beautifulsoup4 matplotlib pandas ipykernel

fedora.before: sudo dnf install -y tk-dev liblzma-dev libffi-dev libncurses5-dev zlib1g zlib1g-dev libssl-dev libreadline-dev libbz2-dev libsqlite3-dev && asdf plugin-add python https://github.com/asdf-community/asdf-python.git
fedora.after: python -m ensurepip && python -m pip install -U requests beautifulsoup4 matplotlib pandas ipykernel

ubuntu.sh: mkdir -p /tmp/android ~/.local/share/android-sdk && cd /tmp/android && wget -q https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-6200805_latest.zip && unzip commandlinetools-linux-6200805_latest.zip -d ~/.local/share/android-sdk && cd ~ && export ANDROID_HOME=~/.local/share/android-sdk && export PATH="$ANDROID_HOME/emulator:$ANDROID_HOME/tools:$ANDROID_HOME/tools/bin:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools:$PATH"

fedora.sh: mkdir -p /tmp/android ~/.local/share/android-sdk && cd /tmp/android && wget -q https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-6200805_latest.zip && unzip commandlinetools-linux-6200805_latest.zip -d ~/.local/share/android-sdk && cd ~ && export ANDROID_HOME=~/.local/share/android-sdk && export PATH="$ANDROID_HOME/emulator:$ANDROID_HOME/tools:$ANDROID_HOME/tools/bin:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools:$PATH"

windows.sh: git clone https://github.com/Davido264/tree-sitter-mcfunction.git $src ; cd $src ; pnpm install ; pnpx node-gyp configure ; pnpm run build

linux.sh: git clone https://github.com/Davido264/tree-sitter-mcfunction.git $src && cd $src && pnpm install && pnpx node-gyp configure && pnpm run build
